title: Depart Tomorrow
description: This modpack features numerous structure mods and a wealth of adventure content, offering fascinating and rich experiences well worth your exploration.
body:
**This modpack exclusively features vanilla-inspired structure mods alongside subtle additions like Farmer's Delight and Artifacts, enriching gameplay while perfectly preserving the authentic vanilla essence.**
![mods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60baffcddfe7aaa203432ed53557954da8aff964.jpeg)
> **Only a handful of mods are standalone; the rest remain deeply rooted in vanilla.**
> # Depart Tomorrow Modpack  

## 🌟 Core Features  
### 🗺️ Exploration & Structures  
- **Revamped World Generation**:  
  - YUNG's Better series (Dungeons, Strongholds, Ocean Monuments, End Islands)  
  - ATi Structures + HopoBetter (mineshafts, ruined portals, underwater ruins)  
  - Medieval Buildings (overhauled villages, castles, Nether/End editions)  
  - Dungeons and Taverns (ancient cities, pillager outposts, swamp huts)  
- **New Dimensions Content**:  
  - TerraBlender biome support + End Castle standalone structures  

### ⚙️ Gameplay Enhancements  
- **Equipment & Enchantments**:  
  - `Artifacts` (unique trinkets) + `UniversalEnchants` (cross-tool enchants)  
  - `Grind Enchantments` (enchanting overhaul) + `TaxFreeLevels` (XP cost reduction)  
- **Storage & Utilities**:  
  - `Sophisticated Backpacks` (upgradeable storage) + `EasyShulkerBoxes` (portable boxes)  
  - `Waystones` (fast travel) + `Trading Post` (villager management)  
- **Quality of Life**:  
  - `Fast Trading` + `Trade Cycling` (villager optimization)  
  - `RightClickHarvest` (crop collection) + `Animal Feeding Trough` (auto-breeding)  

### 🖥️ Performance & Optimization  
- **Critical Optimization Mods**:  
  - `Sodium` (rendering) + `Lithium` (game logic) + `ModernFix` (stability)  
  - `EntityCulling` + `MoreCulling` (render distance optimizations)  
- **GPU/CPU Efficiency**:  
  - `Noisium` (reduces sound lag) + `Iris Shaders` (optimized shader support)  

### ✨ Visual & Immersion  
- **Shader & Lighting**:  
  - Pre-bundled shaders: **BSL**, **Complementary Reimagined**, **Kappa**, **Photon**  
  - `LambDynamicLights` (dynamic lighting) + `Visuality` (particle effects)  
- **UI/UX Upgrades**:  
  - `ModernUI` (interface overhaul) + `Jade` (entity info)  
  - `Xaero's Minimap & World Map` + `OverflowingBars` (HUD improvements)  

## 📦 Included Content Packs  
### Resource Packs (9)  
- `Better Leaves` (3D foliage) + `Cubic Sun/Moon` (celestial bodies)  
- `AL's Creepers Revamped` (creeper variants) + `LowOnFire` (minimal fire overlay)  
- `Xaero's Vanilla GUI` + Chinese localization packs  

### Shader Packs (9)  
| Name                          | Type          |  
|-------------------------------|---------------|  
| Complementary Reimagined r5.5 | High-Fidelity |  
| BSL v10.0                     | Balanced      |  
| Kappa v5.3                    | Realistic     |  
| MakeUp UltraFast              | Performance   |  
| BVS (Best Vanilla Shader)     | Vanilla+      |
